Abhimanyu Easwaran Run Out Mishap: A Lesson In Concentration

Abhimanyu Easwaran Run Out Mishap: A Lesson In Concentration

Abhimanyu Easwaran’s run out has become one of the most talked-about moments in the 2025-26 Ranji Trophy season.

The Bengal captain suffered a bizarre dismissal against Services after leaving his crease for drinks while the ball was still in play. This incident highlights the importance of concentration and situational awareness in professional cricket, serving as a reminder even for experienced players to stay alert at all times.
